title: EMERGENCY SERVICES - 211info
text: LINDHOLM SOCIAL SERVICE OFFICE EMERGENCY SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides clothing, household items, small appliances, furniture, beds, propane vouchers for heating, emergency prescription assistance, and bus tokens when available. Assistance depends on the zip code. 456 Highway 99 N Eugene, OR 97402 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-4pm by appointment only Email (541) 689-6747 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 689-6747 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday/Friday 9am-4pm by appointment only TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on LTD bus line 40. Services: Furniture General Clothing Provision Heating Fuel Payment Assistance Kitchenware Prescription Expense Assistance Small Kitchen Appliances Transportation Passes Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - LANE COUNTY COORDINATED ENTRY ACCESS POINTS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINDHOLM SOCIAL SERVICE OFFICE
